Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 ii 

Tips on Navigating the Codebook 

This document is a detailed codebook that describes each variable in the annual provider (APR) Transformed Medicaid 
Statistical Information System (T-MSIS) Analytic File (TAF) research files. The guide includes several ways for users to 
quickly find the information they need:
